task: take the chicken off the grill
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A black grill with a chicken on top sits on a wooden table. The chicken is a single object with a body that can be grasped. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the chicken on the grill. Then, transport it to a safe area (the table surface) and place it down. Failure modes include dropping the chicken during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the chicken on the grill; Step 2 grasp its body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the table; Step 4 place on the table surface.**
Goal: on(chicken, table); stable(chicken)
Scene: grill, chicken, table
Step 1: reach(chicken)
  affordance_region: the body of the chicken on the grill
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chicken, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chicken) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(chicken)
  affordance_region: the body of the chicken
  contact: holding(chicken) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(chicken)
Step 3: transport(chicken -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table surface
  spatial: above(chicken, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(chicken)
  done_when: above(chicken, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(chicken -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table surface
  contact: surface_contact(chicken, table) [completion]; released(chicken) [completion]
  pose: stable(chicken) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(chicken, table) AND released(chicken)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the chicken on the grill
an empty area on the table surface
an empty area on the table surface
